ai_summary: MosChip Technologies Limited has allotted 2,42,636 equity shares to employees exercising their stock options, increasing the total outstanding shares by a modest 0.12% to 19.47 crore. This routine ESOP exercise generated Rs. 1.25 crore in capital for the company while resulting in minor shareholder dilution. The transaction adheres to SEBI regulations, and no significant red flags are identified.
